title: Certificate in Japanese
content: Certificate in Japanese Department of Languages Programme Level Certificate Duration 6 Months Eligibility Fee Structure About the Programme Eligibility XII with minimum 50% marks in aggregate Fee Structure Duration 6 Months Tuition Fee (per annum) 15000 (For External Members) , 8000 (For GU Members) Medical Insurance (Per Annum) 650 Caution Money (One Time Payment ) 2000 Student ID Card 1000 IMPORTANT LINKS Virtual Tour Blogs Admission Procedure Financial Aid & Loan Facilities Hostel Placements Download Brochure Admission Documents & Undertaking Apply Now XII with minimum 50% marks in aggregate APPLY NOW
